---
title: "Miguel Cosenza Contreras"
description: "Proteomics data scientist developing bioinformatic pipelines for protein interactions, proteolytic activity, and mass-spectrometry-based proteomics research."
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        #quarto-document-content > #title-block-header {
          display: none;
        }
        </style>
---

::: {.hero}
::: {}
# Miguel Cosenza Contreras

Proteomics data scientist developing bioinformatic pipelines for protein interactions, proteolytic activity, and mass-spectrometry-based proteomics research.

:::{.button-row}
[CV](cv.qmd){.primary}
[Publications](publications.qmd)
[Projects](projects.qmd)
[Email](mailto:migueljcc5@gmail.com)
:::
:::

::: {.hero-aside}
![Miguel Cosenza Contreras](assets/miguelcos_personal_pic-900.jpg){.hero-photo}

::: {.hero-meta}
Freiburg im Breisgau, Germany  
[migueljcc5@gmail.com](mailto:migueljcc5@gmail.com)  
[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos) | [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9727-3229) | [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DbsUEGsAAAAJ&hl) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/miguel-cosenza-contreras-972414114/)
:::
:::
:::

I am a biologist by training and a proteomics data scientist with over six years of experience in clinical and experimental research. I work at the interface of experimental design and data analysis, focusing on mass-spectrometry-based proteomics in protein interaction research, cancer, cardiac disease, and infection biology.

At the University of Freiburg, within SFB1381 - Dynamic Organization of Cellular Protein Machineries and the Laboratory of Protease Degradomics, I build and maintain bioinformatic pipelines for studying protein interactions and proteolytic activity. This includes complexome profiling, co-immunoprecipitation assays, blue-native gel mass spectrometry experiments, and integrative analysis of proteomics, terminomics, lipidomics, and proteogenomics data.

## Current Research Focus

::: {.content-grid}
::: {.info-card}
### Protein Complexes
Pipelines for studying protein-protein interactions from shotgun mass-spectrometry-based proteomics data, including complexome and co-immunoprecipitation experiments.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Protease Degradomics
Bioinformatic analysis of proteolytic activity, protein termini, and degradomics workflows across experimental systems.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Multi-omics Integration
Statistical and computational integration across proteomics, terminomics, lipidomics, proteogenomics, and clinical data.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Reproducible Workflows
R, Bioconductor, Quarto, and GitHub workflows for transparent, reusable mass-spectrometry data analysis.
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Clinical Proteomics
Translational biomarker discovery and disease-mechanism studies using mass-spectrometry-based proteomics.
:::
:::

## Selected Publications

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.publication-card}
### TermineR: Extracting information on endogenous proteolytic processing from shotgun proteomics data
Software and method paper for extracting endogenous proteolytic processing information from shotgun proteomics.

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/pmic.202300491) | [Project](https://github.com/MiguelCos/TermineR)
:::

::: {.publication-card}
### Proteometabolomics of initial and recurrent glioblastoma
Clinical proteomics and multi-omics integration study of recurrent glioblastoma biology.

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/neuonc/noad208) | [Project](https://github.com/MiguelCos/gbm_manuscript_data_analysis)
:::

::: {.publication-card}
### The Schistosomiasis SpleenOME
Label-free proteomics study of splenomegaly in host-parasite interaction.

[DOI](https://doi.org/10.3389/fimmu.2018.03137)
:::
:::

## Selected Projects

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.project-card}
### TermineR
R package for extracting and annotating endogenous proteolytic processing information from shotgun proteomics data.

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`proteomics`]{.tag} [`terminomics`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/TermineR) | [Project page](projects/terminer/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### GBM Proteometabolomics
Reproducible analysis repository for proteomics, lipidomics, proteogenomics, and clinical integration in recurrent glioblastoma.

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`clinical proteomics`]{.tag} [`multi-omics`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/gbm_manuscript_data_analysis) | [Project page](projects/gbm-proteometabolomics/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### HUNTER Data Analysis Pipeline
Quarto and R workflows for exploratory and inferential analysis of HUNTER terminal-enrichment experiments.

:::{.tags}
[`Quarto`]{.tag} [`terminomics`]{.tag} [`DIA`]{.tag}
:::

[GitHub](https://github.com/MiguelCos/HUNTER_data_analysis_pipeline) | [Project page](projects/hunter/)
:::
:::
